zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Maria Anastasia Piast於1164年出生在波蘭希維e托可日斯吉桑多米爾桑多米爾時，她的父親Kazimierz Sprawiedliwy Piast26歲，母親Helena Přemyslovec19歲。她和Vsevolod IV of Kiev至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1194年在烏克蘭Київська область享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Anastasia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek male name Anastasios (a derivative of anastasis ‘resurrection’). It has always been popular in Eastern Europe, in honour of a 4th-century saint who was martyred at Sirmium in Dalmatia. It was also used occasionally in England in the Middle Ages and as late as the 17th century; more recently it has made a considerable comeback. One of the daughters of the last tsar of Russia bore this name. She was murdered by the Bolsheviks in 1918 , along with the rest of her family, but in 1920 a woman claiming to be the Romanov princess Anastasia came to public notice in Germany, and a film was later based on this story ( 1956 ).

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: occupational name from Middle Low German pravest ‘provost’. See also Provost .
German: nickname for an ostentatious person, from Middle High German brast ‘pageantry, show, display’.
Austrian German: dialect form of   Propst  .

variants.name: Provost
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Pierre, Andre, Emile, Camille, Lucien, Normand, Alphonse, Cecile, Gilles, Jacques.
French: northern and western variant of Prévost (see Prevost ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (compare 2 below).

English: occupational name from Middle English provost, provest, proust ‘provost, steward, representative’ (Old English prafost), also used for the head of a religious chapter or educational establishment, or, since such officials were usually clergy and celibate, a nickname for a self-important person.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Maria Anastasia Piast was born in 1164, in Sandomierz, Sandomierz, świętokrzyskie, Poland, her father, Kazimierz Sprawiedliwy Piast, was 26 and her mother, Helena Přemyslovec, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Vsevolod IV of Kiev. She died in 1194, in Kyiv, Ukraine, at the age of 30.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Vsevolod IV of Kiev. Elle est décédée en 1194, à Kyiv, Ukraine, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Maria Anastasia Piast 1164 in Sandomierz, Sandomierz, świętokrzyskie, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kazimierz Sprawiedliwy Piast 26 und ihre Mutter Helena Přemyslovec 19. Sie hatte mit Vsevolod IV of Kiev mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1194 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Kyiv, Ukraine.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Maria Anastasia Piast è nata il nel 1164 nel Sandomierz, Sandomierz, świętokrzyskie, Polonia, sua padre, Kazimierz Sprawiedliwy Piast, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Helena Přemyslovec, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Vsevolod IV of Kiev. Morì nel 1194, nel Kyiv, Ucraina, all'età di 30 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Maria Anastasia Piast(이)가 1164년 폴란드 s위e토크르즈이스키 샌도미르즈 샌도미르즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kazimierz Sprawiedliwy Piast(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena Přemyslovec(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Vsevolod IV of Kiev(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 우크라이나 Київська область에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Maria Anastasia Piast родилась в 1164 г. в местности сэндомиирз, Сандомирский, sвиeтокрзиски, Польша, её отцу по имени Kazimierz Sprawiedliwy Piast было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena Přemyslovec, 19.
